outlook.volatilityExpectation: Volatility heavily suppressed by massive positive GEX across all timeframes. Expect mean-reverting price action.
outlook.summary: Total GEX is highly positive (26.73B), indicating dealers are long gamma and will actively suppress volatility by selling into rallies and buying into dips. The 0DTE Max Pain at 7050 creates a strong magnetic pull below the current spot price of 7137.25. Heavy Call resistance at 7150 and structural Monthly Call Wall/Gamma Flip at 7000 define the immediate trading range. High Put/Call Ratios indicate significant hedging activity, providing a strong support floor.
